    import re
    pattern = r'[a-z]+_+[a-z]+'
    match = re.search(pattern, s)
    if match:
        return 'Found a match!'
    else:
        return 'Not matched!'

arguments.code:
def text_match(s):
    import re
    pattern = r'[a-z]+_+[a-z]+'
    match = re.search(pattern, s)
    return 'Found a match!' if match else 'Not matched!'

arguments.answer:
def text_match(s):
    import re
    pattern = r'[a-z]+_+[a-z]+' 
    match = re.search(pattern, s)
    return 'Found a match!' if match else 'Not matched!'
